ogTitle: Dookie College vs Dorodong: Climate Safety

heading: Dookie College vs Dorodong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dookie College, Victoria and Dorodong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dookie College has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Dorodong (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dookie College or Dorodong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dookie College has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Dorodong scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dookie College scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Dorodong scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dookie College or Dorodong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dookie College has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
